notes: Static snapshot of gtnh/src/machines.ts's coefficient model, resolved per RecipeType/crafter-item-name the same way gtnh/src/solver.ts looks it up (`machines[crafter.name] || notImplementedMachine`). Numeric fields are literal values; "dynamic" means the source coefficient is a function of (recipe, choices) in gtnh -- see scripts/gtnh-data/machines.ts for the real logic, and TASKS.md §4.
